component.name: php-vitexsoftware-fluentpdo
component.summary: FluentPDO - PHP 8.1+ Edition with modern features

description.p: FluentPDO is a modernized PHP SQL query builder library using PDO with a smart join builder that automatically creates table joins. This version (3.x) requires PHP 8.1+ and includes modern type declarations, strict typing, and enhanced features. Key features: - Smart Join Builder: Automatically creates JOINs based on column references - Fluent Interface: Method chaining for building queries - PDO Integration: Built on top of PDO for database portability - Type Safety: Modern PHP 8.1+ with strict typing throughout - Union Types: Uses modern PHP union types where appropriate
